title: SuerEchoY
subTitle: 连接底层硅片与具身智能
style: <style>body.home-page .Header { display: none !important; } body.home-page .container { margin-top: 100vh !important; position: relative; z-index: 10; padding-top: 50px; background: var(--color-canvas-default); } #custom-hero { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100vh; background: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555680202-c86f0e12f086?q=80&w=2000&auto=format&fit=crop') no-repeat center center/cover; z-index: 999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } #custom-hero::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 1; } .hero-nav { position: absolute; top: 0; width: 100%; height: 65px; background: rgba(15,15,15,0.3); backdrop-filter: blur(15px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(15px); z-index: 10; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0 5%; box-sizing: border-box; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .hero-nav-links a { color: #e1e4e8; text-decoration: none; margin-left: 25px; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.3s; } .hero-nav-links a:hover { color: #58a6ff; } .hero-content { z-index: 10; text-align: center; color: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .hero-avatar { width: 120px; height: 120px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(88,166,255,0.6); margin-bottom: 30px; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); object-fit: cover; } .hero-avatar:hover { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(360deg); } .typewriter { display: inline-block; padding: 12px 25px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 30px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); font-size: 1.2rem; font-family: monospace; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; border-right: 3px solid #58a6ff; animation: typing 3.5s steps(40, end), blink .75s step-end infinite; } @keyframes typing { from { width: 0 } to { width: 100% } } @keyframes blink { from, to { border-color: transparent } 50% { border-color: #58a6ff; } } .scroll-down { position: absolute; bottom: 40px; z-index: 10; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-size: 2.5rem; cursor: pointer; animation: float 2s ease-in-out infinite; transition: color 0.3s; } .scroll-down:hover { color: #fff; } @keyframes float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-15px); } } .SideNav-item { background: var(--color-canvas-subtle); border-radius: 12px !important; margin-bottom: 16px; padding: 16px; transition: all 0.3s ease; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default); display: block; } .SideNav-item:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(88,166,255,0.15); border-color: #58a6ff; } </style>
